Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5076 0 0}Excuse me, Aigis... Would it be okay if I got a closer look at the parts you found while exploring?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5068 0 0}...It's just as I speculated. These parts can be equipped to Aigis's framework.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}This new base material is much lighter than her current hardware's. It also has different thermal properties and structural durability.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}I think these parts will allow you to do things that would have been impossible before.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}Would you like me to install them? I'd understand if you were hesitant, though...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5028 0 0}Yeah, again, I completely understand how you must feel, but please trust me on this.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I think I've gotten plenty familiar with your internal mechanism by now. You think so, too, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 -1 0 0}All right, then. This would also be a good time to do some maintenance, so why don't we head to your room?[n]{f 1 1}
